prose.en: Assessors MUST achieve a favorable full reassessment by the American Association for Laboratory Accreditation (A2LA) at least once every 2 years to maintain FedRAMP Recognition.

en: Assessors have 75 days to complete corrective actions for nonconformances identified by the American Association for Laboratory Accreditation during a reassessment. If an assessor exceeds the 75 day resolution timeframe, the American Association for Laboratory Accreditation will supply FedRAMP with a narrative of the assessor's current status, the assessor will be designated as In Remediation in the FedRAMP Marketplace, and the assessor must supply a corrective action plan to FedRAMP.
